description: Evaluate a medchem query-language expression over every molecule and write a passes_query boolean column. The expression combines MATCHRULE("..."), HASALERT("..."), HASPROP("desc", <comparator>, value), HASGROUP("..."), and HASSUBSTRUCTURE("SMARTS") with AND / OR / NOT.
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a results CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .csv/.tsv (smiles column), .sdf, or .txt (one SMILES per line)
QUERY is a medchem query-language string
usage: Set INPUT (molecule file) and QUERY (query-language expression). Output: query.csv.
limitation: Requires the medchem + datamol + rdkit + pandas stack (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline. A malformed query errors at runtime inside medchem.
